name: frontend-design
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications.
author: anthropics

name: skill-creator
description: Create new skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
author: anthropics

name: pptx
description: Use this skill any time a .pptx file is involved in any way — as input, output, or both. This includes: creating slide decks, pitch decks, or presentations; reading, parsing, or extracting text from any .pptx file; editing, modifying, or updating existing presentations; combining or splitting slide files; working with templates, layouts, speaker notes, or comments.
author: anthropics

name: pdf
description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to do anything with PDF files. This includes reading or extracting text/tables from PDFs, combining or merging multiple PDFs into one, splitting PDFs apart, rotating pages, adding watermarks, creating new PDFs, filling PDF forms, encrypting/decrypting PDFs, extracting images, and OCR on scanned PDFs to make them searchable.
author: anthropics

name: docx
description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to create, read, edit, or manipulate Word documents (.docx files).
author: anthropics

name: xlsx
description: Handles spreadsheet file operations including opening, reading, editing, and creating .xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, and .tsv files. Applies to tasks like adding columns, computing formulas, formatting, charting, and cleaning tabular data.
author: anthropics

name: webapp-testing
description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.
author: anthropics

name: mcp-builder
description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Covers research and planning, implementation, testing, and evaluation across a four-phase workflow.
author: anthropics

name: canvas-design
description: Generates museum-quality visual art in PNG and PDF formats by developing design philosophies that emphasize form, space, color, and composition expressed through minimal text and maximum visual communication.
author: anthropics

name: web-artifacts-builder
description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui).
author: anthropics

name: doc-coauthoring
description: Guide users through a structured workflow for co-authoring documentation including proposals, technical specs, and decision docs through three stages: context gathering, refinement, and reader testing.
author: anthropics

name: theme-factory
description: Toolkit for styling artifacts with a theme. These artifacts can be slides, docs, reportings, HTML landing pages, etc. Offers 10 pre-configured professional themes with curated color palettes and font pairings.
author: anthropics

name: algorithmic-art
description: Generative art creation using p5.js with seeded randomness, featuring algorithmic philosophies translated into interactive computational aesthetics through parametric exploration.
author: anthropics

name: brand-guidelines
description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel.
author: anthropics

name: internal-comms
description: A set of resources to help write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that a company likes to use. Supports progress/plans/problems updates, company-wide newsletters, FAQ responses, status reports, leadership updates, project updates, and incident reports.
author: anthropics

name: slack-gif-creator
description: Knowledge and utilities for creating animated GIFs optimized for Slack. Provides constraints, validation tools, and animation concepts using PIL/Python graphics.
author: anthropics

name: template-skill
description: A reference template for creating new Claude Code skills. Demonstrates the SKILL.md format, trigger conditions, and best practices for skill authoring.
author: anthropics

name: claude-api
description: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps with prompt caching support. Handles model migrations and Claude feature implementation. Covers single Claude API calls, multi-turn workflows, tool use, structured outputs, agentic loops, managed agents, batch processing, and adaptive thinking.
author: anthropics

name: claude-md-improver
description: Improve and optimize CLAUDE.md project configuration files for better Claude Code session initialization and agent performance.
author: anthropics

name: claude-automation-recommender
description: Analyze your project and recommend Claude Code automation patterns, hooks, and workflow improvements to reduce friction and increase productivity.
author: anthropics

name: agent-development
description: Patterns and best practices for building Claude Code agents including orchestrator design, subagent coordination, and autonomous loop engineering.
author: anthropics

name: command-development
description: Guide for building custom slash commands for Claude Code — covering command structure, parameter handling, and MCP tool integration patterns.
author: anthropics

name: mcp-integration
description: Patterns and reference implementation for integrating MCP servers into Claude Code projects, including authentication, tool discovery, and error handling.
author: anthropics

name: build-mcp-server
description: Step-by-step guide to building a production-ready MCP server from scratch, covering TypeScript SDK setup, tool definitions, authentication, and deployment.
author: anthropics

name: stripe-best-practices
description: Stripe payment integration patterns and best practices for Claude Code projects including webhook handling, subscription management, and secure payment flows.
author: anthropics
